news.headline: US & Russia discuss Ukraine peace as Zelenskiy excluded.
25th anniversary of Walk to Defeat ALS® unites thousands each year to raise funds and support for individuals and families impacted by ALS.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on February 18, 2025, the Walk to Defeat ALS® celebrated its 25th anniversary. This event has united individuals and families affected by ALS for a quarter of a century, providing hope, camaraderie, and essential assistance. Beyond its fundraising goals, this event serves as a platform for over thousands of participants annually to come together and support the fight against ALS.

news.headline: Expeditors Q4 revenue jumps 30% to $2.955 billion, beating estimates. Airfreight services hit $1.063 billion, ocean services rose to $908.435 million.
news.summary: Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. (NYSE:EXPD) reported fourth-quarter earnings per share of $1.68, surpassing the anticipated $1.41. Quarterly sales totaled $2.955 billion, marking a 30% increase from the previous year and surpassing the estimated $2.809 billion. Airfreight services revenues grew to $1.063 billion from $866.122 million, while Ocean freight and ocean services revenues increased to $908.435 million from $511.854 million. CEO Jeffrey S. Musser attributed the growth to strong demand from Asia, a surge in e-commerce driven by de minimis policies, and a rise in technology product demand, leading to limited air capacity access.

news.headline: China ambassador to WTO: US unilateralism threatens to upend the rules-based trading system. WTO must have its voice.
Twin Peaks opened new location in Brandon, Florida on Feb. 17 offering elevated game-day experience with 70 TVs, 24 beers on tap, and scratch-made food.
news.summary: A new sports lodge has opened in a Tampa suburb, offering an enhanced game-day experience with a total of 70 TVs for viewing sports events. The lodge also boasts an impressive selection of 24 beers on tap and serves scratch-made food to patrons.

news.headline: SES expects Full Year 2024 Revenue €1,940-2,000M, Adj. EBITDA €950-1,000M, ahead of Moody’s ratings press release.
news.summary: Luxembourg-based company SES S.A. has acknowledged Moody’s Ratings Press Release regarding its financial standing and is issuing a market update prior to its Full Year 2024 financial results announcement on 26 February 2025. SES anticipates that its Full Year 2024 Results will surpass expectations, with Revenue projected to fall within the range of €1,940-2,000 million and Adjusted EBITDA exceeding the estimated range of €950-1,000 million. Additionally, the planned acquisition of Intelsat is progressing as planned.

news.headline: China Ambassador to WTO: US tariffs create tariff shocks that heighten economic uncertainty AND disrupt global trade and risk global recession.
ITRI presents 8 drone innovations at XPONENTIAL Europe 2025 in Düsseldorf, Feb 18-20.
news.summary: In Düsseldorf, Germany, as of February 18, 2025, the Industrial Technology Research Institute (ITRI) is showcasing its cutting-edge drone technologies at XPONENTIAL Europe 2025. ITRI is unveiling eight revolutionary advancements in drones at the event which will last until February 20.

news.headline: Mellon Foundation launches $35M jazz initiative, including $15M Jazz Legacies Fellowship for 20 fellows.
news.summary: The Jazz Foundation of America partnered with an initiative to establish the $15 million Jazz Legacies Fellowship. This program aims to celebrate the artistic achievements of 20 fellows in its first cohort. The Mellon Foundation recently disclosed a comprehensive $35 million initiative in New York on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Russia's oil exports and transit from Black Sea port of Novorossiisk are suspended on February 18th due to bad weather. CPC blend oil loadings are unaffected - Sources.
Meta stock falls on Tuesday, ending a record 20-day winning streak for shares of the Facebook parent company.
news.summary: The Meta stock started trading on Tuesday with a decline, jeopardizing a remarkable 20-day winning streak for shares of the Facebook parent company. The drop in Meta stock comes as Facebook's parent company had been experiencing an unprecedented run of success with shares. The information was shared on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Warren Buffett buys lagging S&P 500 stock before plunge, reduces stakes in other stocks. Chief stays steady on Apple and Chevron.
news.summary: Renowned investor Warren Buffett of Berkshire Hathaway maintained his positions in tech giant Apple and oil company Chevron while decreasing holdings in multiple other stocks. Despite this, he recently acquired a lagging S&P 500 stock just before its value dropped.

news.headline: Medtronic's stock dropped 7% after missing sales expectations, but profit exceeded forecasts.
news.summary: On Tuesday, Medtronic's stock experienced a significant decline of 7% following lower-than-expected sales results, even though the profits surpassed initial forecasts. This decline led to Medtronic underperforming in its buy zone.

news.headline: Warren Buffett's energy pick Occidental Petroleum focuses on cutting debt, with earnings report on Tuesday.
news.summary: In recent quarters, Occidental Petroleum has been actively working towards reducing its debt. The company, which is a favorite energy stock of Warren Buffett, is focused on this goal. Occidental Petroleum is set to report its earnings on Tuesday, indicating its commitment to financial transparency and performance.

news.headline: Northpoint Commercial Finance partners with Yanmar America to offer exclusive floor plan dealer financing for Rural Lifestyle Group in Adairsville, GA. Feb. 18, 2025. (Characters: 144)
news.summary: Yanmar America has recently joined forces with Northpoint Commercial Finance, a finance company known for its flexible options, to offer exclusive floor plan dealer financing for their Rural Lifestyle Group. The partnership was announced on February 18, 2025, in Adairsville, Georgia. This collaboration aims to provide enhanced financial support to dealers in the rural lifestyle segment. The agreement involves considerable financial investment and is set to benefit a notable number of dealers in this specific group.

news.headline: Institutions launch lstBTC with partners to earn Bitcoin yield while retaining custodian security, without moving assets.
news.summary: Maple Finance, BitGo, Copper, and Hex Trust have collaborated with the Core Foundation to introduce InstitutionalBitcoin, known as lstBTC. The goal of this launch is to offer institutional Bitcoin holders a method to generate yield without the need to transfer their assets from trusted custodians. Through the use of Core blockchain's Dual Staking mechanism, this innovative token enables institutions to earn a Bitcoin-denominated yield while maintaining their holdings with custodians. This partnership and token launch signify a new opportunity for institutional investors to engage in the crypto space efficiently.

news.headline: Zayed Award for Human Fraternity opens submissions for 2026 edition, offering a USD $1 million prize to honor visionary leadership and humanitarian legacy of Sheikh Zayed.
news.summary: Launched in 2019, this prestigious prize commemorates the visionary leadership and humanitarian contributions of the late Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan, the UAE's founder. Valued at USD $1 million, the award has provided crucial support to a variety of global leaders, activists, and organizations, in line with its mission to carry forward the impactful legacy of Sheikh Zayed.

news.headline: Landmaster adds 16 new Classic Edition models for 2025, expanding total product line.
news.summary: In Columbia City, Indiana, on February 18, 2025, Landmaster, a renowned manufacturer of American-made UTVs, has introduced 16 new Classic Edition models for the 2025 lineup. This initiative aims to simplify the process of acquiring a top-notch utility vehicle, offering customers a wider selection of options to choose from.

news.headline: Suave Brands unveils 34 new hair, body, and men's care products in their biggest launch in decades.
news.summary: In a recent move towards independence, Suave has intensified its focus on innovation by introducing 34 new products featuring salon-quality formulas, popular ingredients, and luxurious fragrances. This push for reinvention comes with the commitment to maintaining competitive pricing, setting a new standard in the beauty industry. The Suave Brands Company's efforts in this direction have been particularly noteworthy and are bound to leave a lasting impact on the market.

news.headline: Bloomberg Tax Workpapers named a top new product by Accounting Today for 2025, a recognition for its innovative solution.
news.summary: Arlington, Virginia – On February 18, 2025, Bloomberg Tax & Accounting revealed that Bloomberg Tax Workpapers has been honored as a Top New Product for 2025 by Accounting Today. This esteemed accolade underscores the innovative nature of Bloomberg Tax Workpapers, showcasing its excellence in the accounting industry.

news.headline: Jazwares partners with Yo Gabba Gabba for new toys; global licensing agreement signed with Gabbacadabra LLC.
news.summary: Jazwares, a prominent toy company, has revealed a new global licensing deal to produce a range of premium toys, costumes, and accessories inspired by the popular children's brand Yo Gabba Gabba! The agreement, signed with Gabbacadabra LLC - jointly owned by Yo Gabba Gabba, LLC and WildBrain, a key player in kids' and family entertainment - was brokered with the assistance of business development firm Golde. This partnership will result in a diverse selection of merchandise based on Yo Gabba Gabba!, marking an exciting venture with significant market reach.

news.headline: Glenn Hutchins appointed as Lead Independent Director at CoreWeave, an AI Hyperscaler company on Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: Glenn Hutchins, the Chairman of North Island and Co-Founder of Silver Lake, has been appointed as the Lead Independent Director of CoreWeave's Board of Directors. This announcement was made by CoreWeave, the AI Hyperscaler™, from Livingston, N.J. on February 18, 2025. Hutchins has joined the board to bring his expertise and leadership to the company.

news.headline: Fox CFO Steve Tomsic to speak at Barclays Symposium on Feb 25 at 10:25am Eastern. (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX)
news.summary: In a recent press release dated February 18, 2025 from New York and Los Angeles, it was revealed that Fox Corporation (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX) will have its Chief Financial Officer, Steve Tomsic, taking part in the upcoming Barclays Communications and Content Symposium. The event is scheduled to take place on February 25th at around 10:25 am (Eastern Time) or 7:25 am (Pacific Time). This information was shared by the company and signals their intent to have a presence at this significant symposium.

news.headline: Cube launches Cube Cloud for Microsoft Enterprise, with deeper integration, making it the best semantic layer.
news.summary: CubeCloud has solidified its position as the premier universal semantic layer for Microsoft enterprises through enhanced integration with the Microsoft ecosystem. The leading platform provider, Cube, made this announcement on Feb. 18, 2025, in San Francisco. This development includes increased integrations with Microsoft Power, reinforcing CubeCloud's status as the optimal choice for enterprises leveraging Microsoft tools.

news.headline: Flying Cows to host media day on Feb 25th at Woodsboro Bank Arena in Frederick, MD to preview 2025 season.
news.summary: Exciting chance for local media to engage with players and gain first-hand insights on the upcoming 2025 Flying Cows season in Frederick, Md. The Flying Cows' annual media day is scheduled for next Tuesday, February 25th, from 2:00 to 3:00pm. The event will take place at Hood College - Woodsboro Bank.

news.headline: Pangea releases AI Guard and Prompt Guard to enhance AI security, along with a $10,000 Jailbreak Competition.
news.summary: Pangea, a prominent security solutions provider, has officially launched its AI Guard and Prompt Guard products for general use. The company announced this development on February 18, 2025, in San Francisco. These offerings are designed to bolster security measures for artificial intelligence applications. In addition, Pangea has initiated the registration process for a Virtual Escape Room Challenge. Interested participants can now sign up for this challenge. This news signifies Pangea's continued commitment to advancing security protocols in the industry.

news.headline: General Pump Company acquired Legend Pump & Well Service in San Bernardino, expanding its utility-scale services.
news.summary: SAN DIMAS, Calif.--General Pump Company (GPC), a leading provider of utility-scale water well and pump services for Southern California's essential water infrastructure, has confirmed the purchase of Legend Pump & Well Service. This San Bernardino-based company, established in 2010 by Keith Collier, a 30-year veteran in the industry, has seen significant growth under his leadership. Legend's acquisition by GPC represents a significant expansion for the company. With Legend operating multiple crews and having strong industry experience, this move is set to enhance GPC's reach and capabilities in the region.

news.headline: ODK Media and LG Electronics partner to deliver premium entertainment on LG Hospitality TVs, starting a strategic collaboration.
news.summary: In Fullerton, California on February 18, 2025, ODK Media announced a new partnership with LG Electronics by signing a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU). The agreement aims to improve premium entertainment offerings on LG Hospitality TVs. This collaboration signifies the start of a strategic alliance between the two companies, with ODK Media being a prominent player in the industry.

news.headline: Summary: 1776 Project PAC launched 1776 Project Foundation as an education alternative after Trump plans to abolish Department of Education; emphasizes local control of children's education.Character count: 150
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, President Trump announced his intention to eliminate the Department of Education as part of a larger effort to transfer control of education from the federal government to local school boards. This move signifies a shift towards local governance in education. The focus is on empowering community-based education systems amidst concerns over the performance of local schools.

news.headline: Investor John P. Calamos, Sr. to release biography "The Sky's the Limit" in April 2025 in Metro Chicago, Illinois.
news.summary: In the metropolitan area of Chicago, Illinois, news has recently been revealed that Calamos Investments is set to release a significant biography titled "The Sky's the Limit: Lessons in Service, Entrepreneurship, and Achieving the American Dream." This biography delves into the life of John P. Calamos, Sr., who is known for his roles as the Founder, Chairman, and Global Chief within the organization. This upcoming release has garnered attention and anticipation, highlighting key insights into service, entrepreneurship, and the pursuit of the American Dream. Scheduled for publication in the near future, this biography is expected to provide valuable lessons and experiences.

news.headline: Cineverse's Bloody Press to release Terrifier 3 novelization in 2025, by Tim Waggoner, author of Terrifier 2.
news.summary: The author Tim Waggoner, well-known for his work on the Terrifier 2 novelization, will be writing a new book, following the success of his 2024 title. Cineverse, a prominent entertainment studio listed on Nasdaq as CNVS, revealed that its publishing imprint Bloody Press will be launching the novel. This announcement was made on February 18, 2025, in Los Angeles.

news.headline: LuxCreo launches 4D Bright™ Aligner, combining orthodontic and cosmetic dental care with new patented polymer.
news.summary: LuxCreo, a prominent company in personalized medical and dental devices, unveiled their new product, the 4D Bright™ Aligner, in Chicago. This innovation merges the advantages of the 4D Aligner™ with the aesthetic appeal of whiter teeth, providing patients with a natural and bright smile during treatment. The 4D Bright™ Aligner is supported by LuxCreo’s comprehensive 4D Aligner™ system, which incorporates the patented ActiveMemory™ polymer. LuxCreo aims to offer cutting-edge solutions in this field, emphasizing customization and quality in their products.

news.headline: Grgich Hills Estate enhances philanthropic efforts worldwide through its President's key roles in impactful organizations.
news.summary: Violet Grgich, the President of Grgich Hills Estate, is increasing her involvement in global charity efforts by taking on important positions in prominent organizations. This announcement was made in Napa, California on February 18, 2025. Grgich Hills Estate, a well-known Napa Valley winery, is strengthening its dedication to philanthropy by...

news.headline: Bob Gold & Associates chosen as Agency of Record for SCTE TechExpo25, the largest broadband event in Americas.
news.summary: A leading broadband event, SCTE TechExpo25, recently announced the appointment of Bob Gold & Associates as its Agency of Record to boost industry engagement. This event, known as the largest of its kind, is set to witness a surge in participation and activities with this new collaboration.

news.headline: American Binary launches Ambit Client, the first fully CNSA 2.0 Quantum-Resistant VPN, enhancing cybersecurity protection.
news.summary: In Seattle on February 18, 2025, American Binary unveiled a significant advancement in cybersecurity by introducing Ambit Client. This enterprise VPN solution is the first and sole product to meet the NSA's CNSA 2.0 standard for quantum resistance. This achievement comes at a crucial time as it addresses the increasing demand for secure network protection.

news.headline: Planview buys Sciforma to boost its position in portfolio management solutions, expanding global reach.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Planview revealed its acquisition of Sciforma, consolidating its position as the top player in enterprise portfolio management. The move signifies a strategic decision to enhance Planview's dominance within the industry.

news.headline: Santa Clara's new community Passero pre-leasing, including two eight-story buildings. Greystar investment.
news.summary: A new apartment community named Passero in Santa Clara is now pre-leasing, as announced by Greystar, a prominent company in real estate investment, development, and management, on February 18, 2025. Passero consists of two eight-story buildings in Santa Clara, California.

news.headline: ATA Truck Tonnage Index for January unchanged amid harsh weather. Freight volumes affected by natural disasters.
news.summary: Severe winter conditions and natural disasters negatively impacted transportation volumes in the United States. Recently released data revealed that trucking activity remained steady in January 2025, despite various challenges leading to a decrease in freight volumes across the nation. The American Trucking Associations reported no change in the overall transportation activity during this period. Factors such as harsh winter weather and natural disasters contributed to the downturn in freight volumes, highlighting the challenges faced by the industry.

news.headline: Pebblebee launches Creative Collective program to reward creators promoting Universal trackers, featuring Rising Star & Elite Creator tiers. CEO says fans' feedback led to launch.
news.summary: In Seattle, Pebblebee, a prominent provider of item finder solutions, introduced the Creative Collective initiative today. This program aims to support content creators, tech and travel enthusiasts, and individuals skilled at solving everyday problems, by providing them with rewards for promoting Pebblebee Universal trackers within their communities. The Creative Collective program consists of two tiers: Rising Star and Elite Creator, which include attractive commissions and benefits. Daniel Daoura, the CEO of Pebblebee, stated, "Our customers have shared their feedback, and we have taken it into consideration."

news.headline: Down 16% in a week, SOL sinks as BTC dominance rises. Texas to discuss BTC reserve, $200k BTC breakout predicted. ETH inflows surpass BTC. Ark forecasts $1.5m BTC by 2030. 21Shares XRP ETF filing, Hyperliquid launches mainnet. Pi interest peaks, HK firm doubles shares with 1 BTC purchase. Tether develops brain chip, Europe MiCA to close US policy gaps.
news.summary: Bitcoin's dominance in the crypto market has increased as Solana (SOL) experiences a 16% decline in value over the past week. Today, Texas plans to conduct a public hearing regarding Bitcoin reserves. Analyst Van Straten predicts an upcoming breakout for Bitcoin, foreseeing it reaching $200k by 2025, while Bernstein projects it to reach $1.5 million by 2030. In a noteworthy development, Ethereum ETF inflows surpassed those of Bitcoin in February. Additionally, MEMX exchange has applied to list the 21Shares XRP ETF. Sentiment surrounding SOL remains subdued due to concerns about LIBRA and tokens unlocking. DeFiTuna has exposed multiple individuals associated with LIBRA, prompting the departure of a co-founder of Meteora linked to the project. Jupiter announces an internal investigation related to LIBRA, causing a delay in JUP buybacks to gather community input. Hyperliquid has launched its EVM mainnet, and Pi Network's search interest has surged to a record high. A Hong Kong firm's shares doubled in value in a day following their acquisition of one Bitcoin. Tether is reportedly developing a brain chip similar to Neuralink. In other news, Monad is set to launch its testnet tomorrow, while Europe's MiCA initiative aims to address policy discrepancies with the US.

news.headline: IMA publishes Journal of Independent Medicine for unbiased medical research. Founded by FLCCC, new era begins. (Characters: 105)
news.summary: A new chapter in unbiased medical research has commenced with the launch of the Journal of Independent Medicine by the Independent Medical Alliance (IMA), previously known as FLCCC. This pioneering peer-reviewed publication represents a significant development in the field, aimed at upholding impartiality in medical research. Set to debut on February 18, 2025, in Washington, this journal marks a crucial step towards promoting transparency and credibility in the scientific community. Donning its new identity, the IMA strives to adhere to the highest standards in research and dissemination of medical knowledge. This initiative is poised to shape the future of medical research and aims to play a vital role in advancing healthcare practices.

news.headline: CenterPoint Energy gears up for extreme cold weather in Texas, monitoring forecasts and ensuring readiness for higher demand.ERCOT issues Weather Watch for Feb 19-21.
news.summary: A weather watch has been issued by ERCOT for February 19-21 due to anticipated extreme cold weather in its region. This is expected to lead to increased electrical demand and possibly lower reserves. CenterPoint is actively monitoring forecasts and conducting readiness checks on its electric and natural gas systems in preparation for this period.

news.headline: Royal Caribbean announces the launch of Legend of the Seas in July 2026, tripling world's best family vacation count.
news.summary: In an announcement made on February 18, 2025, in Miami, Royal Caribbean unveiled its latest innovation in cruising. The ship known as Legend of the Seas will redefine family vacations when it sets sail in July 2026. In a groundbreaking move, the cruise liner will triple the capacity of the world's best family vacation offerings. This initiative marks a significant milestone in the travel industry, with the ship promising an unparalleled experience for passengers. Royal Caribbean's new endeavor is set to raise the bar for family vacations, with a debut lineup that will cater to an unprecedented number of travelers seeking a memorable and exciting journey at sea.

news.headline: Dr. Terrence A. Gilbert, DO recognized as Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle for contributions as Leading Critical Care Physician.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on February 18, 2025, Terrence A. Gilbert, DO was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for his work as a Leading Critical Care Physician in The Inner Circle. Dr. Gilbert, a highly respected critical care physician, has made significant contributions in the field.

news.headline: CoiniGo simplifies crypto payments for businesses with fast, scalable transactions globally. Instant, seamless solution for various industries.
news.summary: Businesses in today's rapidly evolving digital economy require smooth, efficient, and adaptable payment solutions to meet global demand. However, many struggle with sluggish transactions, exorbitant fees, and inflexible financial systems ill-suited for a cryptocurrency-driven environment. The demand for a borderless, real-time payment system is higher than ever, and CoiniGo is addressing this need. Beyond being just another crypto payment provider, CoiniGo serves as a cutting-edge transaction engine enabling businesses to instantly send, receive, and manage digital assets worldwide. CoiniGo offers a seamless crypto payment gateway designed for businesses of all sizes, including Forex, E-commerce, fintech, high-frequency trading, and global enterprises. In contrast to traditional solutions hampered by slow processing and operational constraints, CoiniGo ensures immediate transactions, dedicated wallet infrastructure, and a user-friendly experience. The platform has no minimum transaction limit and is detailed extensively on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Whirlpool Corp. to showcase new products at KBIS 2025. Major brands featured, event in Benton Harbor, Mich. Feb. 18.
news.summary: Whirlpool Corporation, a prominent global appliance company, will make a comeback to the Kitchen & Bath Industry Show in Benton Harbor, Michigan on February 18, 2025. The company plans to showcase new products and interactive experiences from four of its renowned brands.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls after U.S.-Russia talks, Warren Buffett buys stocks. Nvidia rises, Meta drops.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline as the Dow Jones fell following discussions between the U.S. and Russia. A stock favored by Warren Buffett displayed a notable increase. While Nvidia showed strong momentum, Meta faced a decline. This update provides live coverage of the current market trends without mentioning the specific source.

news.headline: Glider AI's Skills Validation Platform now on SAP Store, offers AI-enabled assessments & interviews to customers. Cupertinio, Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: Glider AI has recently revealed that their AI-powered Assessments and Interviews now work seamlessly with SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting and SAP SuccessFactors Learning platforms. This integration allows customers to access skills verification and expertise on a large scale. The announcement was made in Cupertino, California on February 18, 2025. Through this collaboration, Glider AI aims to provide effective skills validation to a wide range of clients.

news.headline: SEC's deadline extension poses a challenge to Coinbase as the cases against them and Binance are uncertain post Crypto Task Force creation.
news.summary: The regulatory inquiries into Coinbase and Binance are facing uncertainty with the establishment of the Crypto Task Force.

news.headline: Orocidin's QR-01 has good safety profile in preclinical toxicity study for aggressive periodontitis treatment. (Includes key details)
news.summary: Beverly Hills, CA - On Feb. 18, 2025, Orocidin A/S, a subsidiary of Nordicus Partners Corporation (OTCQB: NORD), specializing in aiding Nordic and U.S. life sciences firms in entering the U.S. market, finished its initial toxicity study for QR-01. QR-01 is an innovative therapy for aggressive periodontitis.
